search_queries_used: site:asahq.org anesthesia documentation vascular access line procedures
site:doh.gov.ae day surgery line placement documentation
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic management or dose instructions for Line placement documentation prompt
generic anesthesia landing pages without an exact section for Line placement documentation prompt
rejection_reasons: Procedure selection and technical instructions were outside documentation-only scope.
The candidate source category "device-specific placement algorithms" did not provide exact documentation-only evidence for this workflow and was not mapped.
Autonomous management, medication, dose, procedure, escalation, or discharge instructions were outside the documentation-only scope.
Landing pages and search snippets were not accepted as exact evidence.
population_applicability: Patients receiving anesthesia care in whom a vascular or other line was placed and documented.
setting_applicability: Direct for the anesthesia record; sterile technique, competency, indication, and complications require procedure-specific sources.
UAE_applicability: International ASA documentation evidence; UAE credentialing and facility procedure policy remain required.
recency_verification: Current ASA 2023 documentation statement and DoH V1/2024 record standard were reviewed on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: No newer ASA documentation statement was identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA statement supports recording vascular access and other line procedures performed during anesthesia care; it does not recommend or describe a placement technique.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports re-evaluation, equipment, medicines, staff, monitoring, techniques, positioning, lines and procedures, unusual events, fluids or blood products, output, and transfer status as recorded facts.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact ASA preanesthesia documentation section supports risk, airway, cardiorespiratory, reviewed-investigation, consultation, plan, and consent fields for Line placement documentation prompt; each remains clinician-entered and conditional on assessment.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

unresolved_source_gaps: Line type, indication, site, laterality, ultrasound use, attempts, asepsis, confirmation, complication, removal, and care plan remain unsupported.
Legacy duration presets, broad generic interval-history wording, and any content not explicitly mapped to an exact section remain unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No source mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, anesthesia plan, investigation, procedure, medication, dose, referral, discharge decision, or urgency conclusion.
UAE facility policy, credentialing, pathway, and qualified anesthesiologist review remain required before use.
